case_title: ABLE HERRERA VS. CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERRERA, ABLE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-07-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-23-2004

ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-07-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (NTC & ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT WAS NEVER RETURNED. DEFT ACKNOWLEDGED RECEIPT THROUGH ITS INSURANCE CO AIG BY WAY OF A LETTER DATED OCT-01-04. EXHIBIT A PURSUANT TO CCP 417.10(A) WHICH ALLOWS "OTHER WRITTEN ACKNOWLEDGMENT," SERVICE SHOULD BE DEEMED EFFECTUATED AS OF OCT-01-04) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERRERA, ABLE SERVED AUG-30-2004, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE OCT-01-2004 AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
